result.stdout:
Description:
  otel-events Schema CLI — validate, generate, and diff .otel.yaml schema files

Usage:
  OtelEvents.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  validate <path>   Validate an .otel.yaml schema file
  generate <path>   Generate C# source files from an .otel.yaml schema
  diff <old> <new>  Compare two schema versions and detect breaking changes

commands.payload:
Description:
  otel-events Schema CLI — validate, generate, and diff .otel.yaml schema files

Usage:
  OtelEvents.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  validate <path>   Validate an .otel.yaml schema file
  generate <path>   Generate C# source files from an .otel.yaml schema
  diff <old> <new>  Compare two schema versions and detect breaking changes

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compare two schema versions and detect breaking changes

Usage:
  OtelEvents.Cli diff <old> <new> [options]

Arguments:
  <old>  Path to the old (baseline) .otel.yaml schema file
  <new>  Path to the new .otel.yaml schema file

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate C# source files from an .otel.yaml schema

Usage:
  OtelEvents.Cli generate <path> [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Path to .otel.yaml schema file

Options:
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Output directory for generated C# files
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
